name: talocode
description: Talocode inside Codex — use Talocode APIs as MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Talocode inside Codex — use Talocode APIs as MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Access Talocode Cloud AI capabilities from Codex. Use Tera for chat, code review, code explanation, code writing, text rewriting, and content drafting. Use SearchLane for web search, news, and research. Use GeoLane for geo-SEO auditing. Generate AI skill packs from GitHub profiles, repos, docs, and text. Experimental tools for MemoryLane, GateLane, x-agent, and DevTool.
defaultPrompt: Generate a skill pack from this repo
